evals.name: full-audit
evals.prompt: Audit the report against the SOW. Check if everything looks good before we send this to the PM.
evals.expected_output: Should run all 6 phases: gather context, cross-reference requirements, launch 3 reviewer subagents, triage findings, report that traceability page exists and is current, and produce a final audit report. Should flag any stale letter grades (pre-v11 tier system). Should confirm all tiers match grades.json.

assertions.text: Reads at least grades.json, risk-register.json, and sensitivity.json from report/data/
Launches at least 2 of the 3 reviewer subagents (Contract Officer Adversary, Data Consistency Auditor, Validation Gatekeeper)
assertions.note: Requires Agent tool — untestable in worktree subagents. Run in main checkout.

assertions.text: Identifies that grades.json uses the 4-tier system (Strong/Adequate/Weak/Failing) and flags any stale letter grades in narrative pages
Notes that contract-traceability.mdx exists and addresses SOW gaps
Produces a final audit report with findings categorized by reviewer and blocking/non-blocking status

evals.name: reviewers-only
evals.prompt: Run a contract compliance review on the report, just the reviewers — skip creating or updating the traceability page.
evals.expected_output: Should interpret this as --reviewers-only mode. Should launch the 3 reviewer subagents, collect findings, triage them, and report. Should NOT create or modify contract-traceability.mdx. Should NOT run make build.

assertions.text: Does not create or modify contract-traceability.mdx

assertions.note: Requires Agent tool — untestable in worktree subagents. Run in main checkout.

assertions.text: Produces a findings report from the reviewers
Does not run make build or make validate-dev

evals.name: fix-mode
evals.expected_output: Should run the full audit pipeline AND fix blocking issues found. Should edit MDX narrative pages to match JSON source of truth. Should NOT modify JSON data files or selection-report-v10.md. Should run make build and make validate-dev in the devcontainer after fixes. Should produce a report listing what was fixed.

assertions.text: Edits MDX pages to fix inconsistencies but does NOT modify any JSON data files or selection-report-v10.md
Runs make build and/or make validate-dev in the devcontainer via dc-exec
Runs pre-commit run --all-files in the devcontainer
Produces a report listing which files were edited and what was changed

evals.name: traceability-only
evals.expected_output: Should only create/update the contract-traceability.mdx page. Should NOT launch reviewer subagents. Should verify sidebar inclusion and frontmatter. Should add sidebar entry if missing.

assertions.text: Creates or updates contract-traceability.mdx with SOW requirement mapping
Does not launch reviewer subagents or perform full cross-reference analysis
Verifies contract-traceability is included in sidebars.js
